title: The Vanilla Server
description: A server-side modpack that provides many quality of life features, optimizations, fixes and cross-platform compatibility with Bedrock version.
body:
# The Vanilla Server
_**Simple server-side modpack to allow Java and Bedrock players play together!**_

## Features
- **Vanilla friendly:** all mods aim to follow classic Minecraft Vanilla vibes with no weird or "unminecraftish" mechanics added.
- **Server-side:** the modpach is designed to run on servers, so there are no client-side only mods here.
- **Bedrock compatibility:** despite it's being Fabric modpack, it allows your Bedrock friends to join and play alongside Java players!
- **Bugfixes:** fixes many bugs included in the [Minecraft Bug Tracker](https://bugs.mojang.com/projects/MC/issues/MC-116641?filter=allopenissues).
- **Performance:** lots of network and world loading improvements.
- **Trade:** open your own shop and trade with the others!

## Informations
- Every major release will have music band assigned to it for making it easier to notice bigger update
- Modpack is designed to follow every major Java release starting with 1.21
